title: White Wicker Basket For Hampers Make You Own Gift Hamper Kit Birthday Christening Newborn Wedding Christmas Gifts Hampers (Beige)
features: The kit includes a wicker hamper basket and a gift packaging bag in four colors.
The gift packaging bag includes 100g High Quality shredded paper, a clear cellophane bag and a pull bow
Great for putting together desirable treats, snacks, gifts to make a lovely and thoughtful gift hampers for your loved ones
Perfect for celebrating any occasions, four different colors gift packaging bags to meet your special need
Hand-woven natural wicker hampers is stylish and practical. External measurements: Width 39 cm Depth 27 cm Height 9 cm
Great quality basket which could presents perfect gifts beautifully.
The versatile basket can be reused for storage, organization, display etc.
description: Product Description All You Need to Make A Perfect Gift Hamper For Your Loved Ones Perfect for Making a Thoughtful and Beautiful Gift Hampers This gift hamper kit includes a hamper made of natural wicker, a pull bow, a cello wrap and 100 g shredded paper Assemble a personalized and fantastic hamper for your loved one, for celebrating any specially occasions A very Practical and Sturdy basket, good size and well made. Roomy enough to fill lots of treats, drinks, toiletries and more Once your personalized gifts are given and the celebrations are over, the lovely basket can be used again for multi purposes, such as display and storage External measurements: Width 39 cm Depth 27 cm Height 9 cm Four Color Options With Red Gift Packaging With Pink Gift Packaging With Beige Gift Packaging With Blue Gift Packaging Gift Hamper Gift Hamper Gift Hamper Gift Hamper Gift Hamper Gift Hamper Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 185 3.6 out of 5 stars 11 4.5 out of 5 stars 185 4.3 out of 5 stars 734 — — Price £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £5.99 £ 5 . 99 — no data — no data Shape Oval Oval Oval Rectangular Rectangular Rectangular Feature Double Handles Liner Handle Double Handles Lightweight Lightweight Lightweight
